mapper.select: SELECT m.id AS messageId, m.sender_id AS senderId, CASE WHEN m.sender_role = 'PATIENT' THEN p.name WHEN m.sender_role = 'DOCTOR' THEN d.name ELSE '未知' END AS senderName, m.sender_role AS senderRole, m.content, m.send_time AS sendTime, (m.sender_id = #{currentUserId}) AS isSelf FROM consultation_message m LEFT JOIN patient p ON m.sender_id = p.id AND m.sender_role = 'PATIENT' LEFT JOIN doctor d ON m.sender_id = d.id AND m.sender_role = 'DOCTOR' WHERE m.appointment_id = #{appointmentId} ORDER BY m.send_time ASC
